title: AWeber vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare AWeber vs Constant Contact: pricing, features, ease of use & more to find the best email marketing tool for your business.
h1: AWeber vs Constant Contact: A Detailed Comparison
intro: AWeber and Constant Contact are two established email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. AWeber focuses on simplicity with a free tier, while Constant Contact emphasizes comprehensive marketing tools for businesses willing to pay. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your email marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Autoresponders, RSS-to-email, AMP emails, landing pages
comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, SMS, social media ads, e-commerce

choose_a_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur looking to start for free with up to 500 subscribers
You need powerful autoresponders and RSS-to-email functionality
You want a 30% recurring affiliate commission if promoting the platform
choose_b_if: You need SMS marketing, social media ads, and event management in one platform
You're running an e-commerce business needing integrated selling tools
You operate a nonprofit or local business requiring comprehensive marketing features

faq.q: Is AWeber better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. AWeber excels for budget-conscious bloggers and solopreneurs thanks to its free tier and simplicity, while Constant Contact offers more advanced features like SMS, social media ads, and e-commerce integration for businesses willing to invest. AWeber also has better customer satisfaction ratings overall.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Constant Contact?
faq.a: AWeber is significantly cheaper if you're starting out, offering a free plan for up to 500 subscribers. Constant Contact has no free tier and starts at $12/month. However, once you exceed 500 subscribers on AWeber, pricing becomes competitive between the two platforms.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching is straightforward. Both platforms support importing email lists from other providers. You can export your contacts from Constant Contact and import them into AWeber to maintain your subscriber data throughout the transition.
